XAUUSD.estimated_readiness: Close: missing RR >= 2 and Risk approved
XAUUSD.reject_reason: Blocked because Level 3 needs one bonus confirmation.

session.session_note: Round 3: edge-score validation. Requires H4/M15 history, RR >= 2.0, risk approval, clean spread, higher-timeframe bias, and enough SMC confluence. London/NY is advisory only.

autopsy.missing_confirmation: H1/H4 HTF alignment, momentum/displacement, pullback/retest, BOS, liquidity sweep, FVG retest, clean spread, and RR >= 2.0
autopsy.suggested_rule_fix: Require BOS or a clear liquidity sweep before accepting score-5 entries.

trades.notes: Reconciled AUTO validation open MT5 position. Close synchronized from MT5 history.
